title: Plot hole in EoTV
wikitext:
[]: Plot hole in EoTV.             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Tue Aug 29, 2006 4:19 pm In that one scene where everything is "normal", Rei would not be there. Yui is still alive, and Gendo made Rei when he tried to get back Yui. Which also means, if Yui hasn't absorbed into Eva-01, then Eva obviously doesn't exist, which throws out GOS1/2's Evas appearances. Which also means angels don't exist. Therefore, there is no Tokyo-3, because Tokyo was never attacked by the angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Tue Aug 29, 2006 5:02 pm I think in an alternate reality Rei was just born like a normal kid.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Aug 29, 2006 5:22 pm well...if the idea of the whole thing is "what the world would be if Eva and the angels didn't exist" of course i think more specifically to be "What would Shinji be if he were not an Eva pilot" ...since his conflic was that he would be meaningless without Eva...the scene was to prove that incorrect for him...to base any plot holes on that is trivial...Its an alternate life with everyone in it...so dont worry about it...its meant to be taken with a grain of salt

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 29, 2006 6:11 pm It's an alternate reality, an example of what Shinji's perfect world might presumably be like. I like it better than the alternate reality presented in the alternate live action sequence in which Shinji simply doesn't exist.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Aug 29, 2006 6:14 pm is that what it was supposed to be?...was the girl at the beginning supposed to be Misato?...dang... i honestly didnt like the live action sequence during the Jesu Joy of Man's Desiring song...didnt see the point of it

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Aug 29, 2006 6:21 pm you should check out the entire LA sequence, it's somewhere on EM's site (oh here it is: http://www.evamonkey.com/alternate_live_action.php). Jesu Joy of Man's Desiring is supposed to be more allegro, but the one used in EoE is almost half as slow. I thought it was a nice effect.

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Tue Aug 29, 2006 8:24 pm you know its funny...cuz weren't Shinji, Asuka and Rei's counterparts (their voice actors) in that scene?..Wouldn't it mean that Shinji's a girl in that alternate universe? lol Of course I doubt its true but thinking it as a joke is pretty funny to me. And, well...Ya this is AU so it can be different in so many ways but anything can still be possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Aug 30, 2006 3:59 am The Eva Monkey wrote: It's an alternate reality, an example of what Shinji's perfect world might presumably be like. I like it better than the alternate reality presented in the alternate live action sequence in which Shinji simply doesn't exist.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 30, 2006 6:55 am EoTV is a plot hole. One ... big ... plot ... hole. </spam>

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Aug 30, 2006 3:33 pm And we were all stupid enough to fall into it

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Aug 30, 2006 3:58 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I like it better than the alternate reality presented in the alternate live action sequence in which Shinji simply doesn't exist.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Aug 30, 2006 4:00 pm Hey! You there! Yes, you with that pimp outfit! Can you send a rope down for me? Ah, thanks! ... ... ... Damn you, Anno! This isn't a rope! This is EOE! *Big white piano falls on Fabby's head* Ouch...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Aug 30, 2006 4:28 pm Darius wrote: you know its funny...cuz weren't Shinji, Asuka and Rei's counterparts (their voice actors) in that scene?..Wouldn't it mean that Shinji's a girl in that alternate universe? lol Of course I doubt its true but thinking it as a joke is pretty funny to me. And, well...Ya this is AU so it can be different in so many ways but anything can still be possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Wed Aug 30, 2006 7:11 pm Isn't the LA scene supposed to be the world that Shinji imagines where he doesn't exist? I actually didn't like that scene much. It seemed cheap, and it was kind of boring like a soap opera. I really would have been out of place in the movie (the bits that were left in there already felt that way though).

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Aug 31, 2006 10:59 am I've read somewhere that it's hinted in GoS2 that Gendo still was involved with the creation of an artifical human, so Rei could be the result. If not, then maybe she's just some random albino chick? On the same note, Asuka should be in Germany, so what the hell is she doing in Japan?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sat Sep 02, 2006 11:12 am Legend of the Past wrote: I've read somewhere that it's hinted in GoS2 that Gendo still was involved with the creation of an artifical human, so Rei could be the result. If not, then maybe she's just some random albino chick? On the same note, Asuka should be in Germany, so what the hell is she doing in Japan?

[]: Re: Plot hole in EoTV.             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 03, 2006 5:14 am In the alternate live action, the problem with Shinji being there would have been that Megumi Ogata is much more manly than Shinji. Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: In that one scene where everything is "normal", Rei would not be there.

[]: Re: Plot hole in EoTV.             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Sep 03, 2006 6:12 am Mr. Tines wrote: This is "What if Eva were a highschool comedy" There has to be a mysterious transfer student. Perhaps in that world she is actually the manifestation of a mysterious dataspace entity (and Kaworu, one of a mysterious organization of espers).

[]: Re: Plot hole in EoTV.             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 03, 2006 7:11 am Legend of the Past wrote: And Asuka's a time traveller?

[]: Re: Plot hole in EoTV.             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Sep 03, 2006 12:09 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Legend of the Past wrote: And Asuka's a time traveller?

Therefore, there is no Tokyo-3, because Tokyo was never attacked by the angels.
